_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of therapeutic sensitivities in a spheroid drug combination screen of Neurofibromatosis Type I associated High Grade Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: shows the log2 fold change data in RFP signal (spheroid assays)...Positive values (green) denote cell growth; negative values (red) denote cell death
details: Successfully used for spheroid drug sensitivity screening to measure RFP signal changes and cell death with Log2 fold change measurements
